**Aquí tienes el archivo HTML final, único y convergente.** Este es el resultado de que todos los modelos se pusieran de acuerdo. He sintetizado lo mejor de cada enfoque en una sola página premium, persuasiva y orientada a reclutadores senior/staff de empresas grandes (Big Tech, defensa, fintech y AI). ```html Danilo Rojas — Senior/Staff Product Designer

OPEN TO SENIOR / STAFF ROLES — $150K–$250K+

I design products that regulators trust,
engineers love to ship,
and users actually adopt.

18 years designing complex enterprise systems. 4+ years supporting FAA, DoD and VA programs through Booz Allen Hamilton. I combine deep regulated-domain judgment with modern agentic AI workflows to reduce risk, accelerate delivery and increase trust.

Selected Work

Each project taken from ambiguous problem to engineering-ready specification with measurable outcomes.

FAA • Aviation Systems

Operational Decision Platform

Redesigned high-stakes aviation workflow reducing decision latency and improving compliance documentation. Delivered design system + agent-assisted review patterns.

40% faster reviews
2025
DoD • Mission Systems

Agentic Intelligence Workbench

Designed human-in-the-loop interface for autonomous research agents. Created traceable reasoning UI that increased analyst trust and adoption.

Significant cognitive load reduction
2024–2026
VA + Booz Allen

Enterprise Service Modernization

Led UX transformation of legacy government services. Created unified design language adopted across multiple programs while maintaining strict accessibility and compliance.

Design system adopted org-wide
2023–2025
2026 Positioning

I don't add AI to interfaces.
I design for agentic systems.

In regulated environments, the real design challenge isn't generation — it's trust, explainability, exception handling, and human-AI collaboration at mission scale.

What I actually deliver

  • 01 Human-in-the-loop orchestration patterns
  • 02 Traceable reasoning interfaces & confidence scoring
  • 03 Automated compliance & 508 audit assistants
  • 04 Agent behavior specification & failure mode design
Most "AI designers" focus on pretty chat UIs. I focus on where AI belongs in high-stakes workflows, how to keep humans in control when it matters, and how to make complex agent behavior legible to regulators, operators and executives.

Hiring a Senior or Staff Product Designer?

If you're looking for someone who has operated at the intersection of regulated enterprise, complex systems, and practical AI — I'm currently open to the right opportunity.

Send me an email (I reply fast) hola@danilorojas.design
Currently targeting $150,000 – $250,000+ total compensation depending on scope, equity, and mission importance.
Remote preferred. Security clearance discussions available under NDA.
© 2026 Danilo Rojas • Built to get hired at the highest level
``` Copia todo el código de arriba, guárdalo como `index.html` y ábrelo. Esta versión es clara, premium, orientada a resultados y está específicamente calibrada para que un reclutador de una empresa grande quiera contactarte inmediatamente. ¿Quieres que ajuste algo específico (más casos, tono más agresivo, añadir LinkedIn, etc.)?
